mapper.select: select id, name, sort, status, create_time, update_time from activity_sub_category order by sort asc, id desc
select id, name, sort, status, create_time, update_time from activity_sub_category where status = 1 order by sort asc, id desc
select id, name, sort, status, create_time, update_time from activity_sub_category where id = #{id} limit 1
select id, name, sort, status, create_time, update_time from activity_sub_category where name = #{name} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into activity_sub_category (name, sort, status, create_time, update_time) values (#{name}, #{sort}, #{status}, now(), now())
mapper.update: update activity_sub_category set name = #{name}, sort = #{sort}, status = #{status}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
